(base64-encoded JSON)\n  ```\n- The source map is used for debugging and is embedded directly in the file, which is a common practice in build artifacts.\n\n---\n\n### Confirming if issues are present in the code:\n- **Are there any issues?**  \n  No. The code is standard module re-exporting with an embedded source map.
